caption: A man with grey hair and glasses stands behind a podium, speaking into a black microphone. He is wearing a light blue patterned button-down shirt featuring bird designs and a colorful yellow and green stripe across the chest, complemented by a long beaded necklace with a pendant. He is looking downward, appearing to read from papers resting on the podium. Behind him is a background of horizontal brown blinds. To the right of the man, the text "ORCA" is displayed in a white box with black lettering. Throughout the sequence of frames, the man remains in a stable position, making minimal movements as he continues to read and speak, while the overall setting, his attire, and the on-screen text remain unchanged.
